name: Homemade Sidewalk Chalk Recipe
recipeIngredient: 1 cup plaster of Paris (do not pack)
Liquid tempera paint in various colors
Disposable mixing tubs or margarine tubs
Disposable molds (e.g., toilet paper rolls with tape covering one end)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the plaster into a container.
2. Using a disposable stick, stir in most of the water until combined.
3. Add 2 to 3 tablespoons of liquid tempera paint, mixing well, especially at the bottom.
4. Gradually add more water to achieve the desired consistency, stirring thoroughly.
5. Pour the mixture into the molds.
6. Allow the chalk to dry completely.
7. Remove the chalk from the molds once it is fully dried.
8. Have fun!
